content: GitHub official guidance says environment secrets are withheld until protection rules pass, concurrency groups control overlapping runs, GITHUB_TOKEN permissions should be least privilege, untrusted pull_request_target/workflow_run inputs are hazardous, OIDC replaces supported long-lived cloud credentials, and actions should be pinned to full commit SHAs. Release jobs must avoid cancel-in-progress after external mutation begins and must isolate any mooncakes token because OIDC support is not documented for that registry.
